stem: A graph shows a paper airplane's height above the floor y, in inches, x seconds after it was thrown from a balcony. The graph is a parabola opening upward with vertex (5, 3) and passing through (0, 12). Which of the following is the best interpretation of the y-intercept of the graph?

answerOptions.content: The paper airplane's height was 0 inches above the floor 12 seconds after it was thrown.
The paper airplane's minimum height was 0 inches above the floor.
The paper airplane's minimum height was 12 inches above the floor.
The paper airplane's height was 12 inches above the floor when it was thrown.

rationale:
Choice D is correct. The y-intercept of the graph is (0, 12), corresponding to x = 0 seconds. Since x represents the number of seconds after the plane was thrown, the y-intercept tells us the plane's height when it was thrown (12 inches).

Choices A, B, and C are incorrect; A swaps the coordinates, while B and C confuse the y-intercept with the minimum value of the function (which occurs at the vertex, not the y-intercept).
